title: Mile Rock Beach 🏖️ San Francisco, California State, United States
content: Mile Rock Beach is one of the best beaches in San Francisco, small and relatively uncrowded. The beach is pet friendly and perfect for dogs. It's clean.

title: Mile Rock Beach - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 (with ...
content: A beautiful and isolated beach replete with stacked rock art. From the beach, you feel like you are in a remote area blanketed by the sound of breaking surf.

title: Mile Rock Beach in SF: Local's guide
content: Mile Rock Beach is a tiny, secluded beach at the entrance to San Francisco Bay, scene of many shipwrecks, but a pretty detour off the gorgeous Lands End Trail.
